prs.title: Pizza slice animation user akku
prs.body:
## Description
Added an interactive **Pizza Slice Animation** project that creates a fun and mouth-watering visual experience using pure HTML and CSS animations.

## Features
- 360° rotating pizza with scale animation on hover
- Melting cheese drops with staggered timing
- Bouncing emoji reactions (😍😋🤤)
- Spinning dashed circle border effect
- "DELICIOUS!" text reveal with shadow effect
- Responsive design that works on all screen sizes
- Pure CSS animations - no JavaScript required
- Bold red background for pizza shop vibes

## Technical Implementation
- **HTML5** for semantic structure
- **CSS3** for animations using:
  - `@keyframes` for melt, spin, and bounce effects
  - Transform properties (rotate, scale, translate) for smooth motion
  - Sequential animation delays for realistic cheese melting
  - Border-radius for circular shapes
  - Text-shadow for enhanced typography
  - RGBA colors for semi-transparent elements

## Animation Details
- Pizza rotates 360° and scales up 1.3x on hover
- 5 cheese drops fall with sequential delays (0.1s - 0.5s)
- Cheese pieces fade in/out while falling and scaling
- Dashed circle spins continuously in 3-second loops
- 3 emoji hearts bounce up with staggered animation
- Text appears smoothly with professional shadow effect
- All animations use ease-out timing for natural feel

## How to Use
1. Open `index.html` in any modern browser
2. Hover over the pizza emoji 🍕
3. Watch the delicious animation magic!

## Files Added
- `index.html` - Main HTML structure
- `style.css` - Animation styles and effects
- `meta.json` - Project metadata

## Hacktoberfest 2025
This contribution is made for **Hacktoberfest 2025** 


## Preview
Hover over the pizza to see:
- Spinning pizza transformation
- Melting cheese effect
- Emoji reactions
- Rotating circle border
- "DELICIOUS!" message

---

prs.title: Rocket launch animation user akku
prs.body:
## Description
Added an interactive **Rocket Launch Animation** project that creates an engaging visual experience using pure HTML and CSS animations.

## Features
- Smooth rocket launch animation triggered on hover
- Realistic flame effect with flickering animation
- Twinkling star effects for space ambiance
- Responsive design that works on all screen sizes
- Pure CSS animations - no JavaScript required
- Modern dark space-themed UI

## Technical Implementation
- **HTML5** for semantic structure
- **CSS3** for animations using:
- `@keyframes` for rocket launch trajectory
- Transform properties for smooth motion
- Filter effects for flame blur
- Gradient backgrounds for realistic flame
- Timed animation delays for sequential star twinkling

## Animation Details
- Rocket ascends with subtle rotation for realistic movement
- Flame follows the rocket with synchronized positioning
- Stars appear sequentially with fade-in/fade-out effects
- Launch text countdown fades after animation completes
- All animations complete in 2 seconds

## How to Use
1. Open `index.html` in any modern browser
2. Hover over the rocket to trigger launch sequence
3. Watch the rocket blast off into space!


## Hacktoberfest 2025
This contribution is made for **Hacktoberfest 2026**

prs.title: Coffee cup mist animation
prs.body:
## Description
Added an interactive **Coffee Cup Animation** project that creates a cozy and engaging visual experience using pure HTML and CSS animations.

## Features
-  Smooth coffee cup lift animation on hover
-  Realistic rising steam effect with staggered animation
-  Floating heart animation for warmth and love
-  "HOT & FRESH!" text reveal effect
-  Responsive design that works on all screen sizes
-  Pure CSS animations - no JavaScript required
-  Modern dark-themed UI with warm color palette

## Technical Implementation
- **HTML5** for semantic structure
- **CSS3** for animations using:
- `@keyframes` for steam rising and heart floating effects
- Transform properties for smooth cup lift
- Filter blur for realistic steam appearance
- RGBA colors for semi-transparent steam
- Sequential animation delays for natural steam flow

## Animation Details
- Coffee cup lifts 20px upward when hovered
- Three steam trails rise with staggered timing (0s, 0.3s, 0.6s delays)
- Steam gradually fades and expands while rising
- Heart floats upward with scale and fade effect
- Text appears smoothly on hover
- All animations use ease-in-out timing for natural motion

## How to Use
1. Open `index.html` in any modern browser
2. Hover over the coffee cup emoji
3. Enjoy the warm, animated coffee experience!

## Files Added
- `index.html` - Main HTML structure
- `style.css` - Animation styles and effects
- `meta.json` - Project metadata

## Hacktoberfest 2025
This contribution is made for **Hacktoberfest 2025**

prs.title: Music on emoji withs beats animation
prs.body:
## Beats Hover Animation

### Description
An interactive hover animation featuring a headphone emoji (🎧) with animated sound waves and text effects. When you hover over the beats, it creates a music playback experience with pulsing sound waves on both sides.

### Features
- Beats icon scales up and rotates on hover
- Animated sound wave bars that pulse rhythmically
- Glowing effect on hover
- "MUSIC ON!" text appears dynamically
- Clean dark theme with smooth transitions

### Technologies Used
- HTML5
- CSS3
- CSS Animations & Transitions
- Flexbox for centering

### Demo
Hover over the headphones to see the music come alive with animated sound waves!

---

**Hacktoberfest 2025** 
This contribution is part of Hacktoberfest 2025. Happy coding!

prs.title: 2d dp
prs.body:
What this PR does

This PR adds a well-documented implementation of 2D Dynamic Programming in Python.

 File Added

dynamic_programming/2D_DP.py

 Description

Demonstrates 2D DP table construction step-by-step for better understanding.

Includes clear comments and detailed explanations throughout the code.

Covers approach breakdown, time & space complexity analysis, and backtracking logic.

Added two example test cases (one normal and one edge case).

Example outputs included in the if __name__ == "__main__": section.

 Testing

 Verified all test cases — outputs match the expected results.

 Hacktoberfest

This contribution is part of Hacktoberfest 2025 
Thank you for maintaining this awesome repository and supporting open-source contributions!

prs.title: added Queue explanation
prs.body:
# Hacktoberfest 2025 Contribution

##  What this PR adds
Adds `Queue/queue_explained.py` — an educational file that explains the **Queue data structure** with multiple implementations:
- Simple list-backed queue  
- Circular array queue  
- Linked List queue  

Includes complexity analysis and runnable examples/tests for quick verification.

## Why this is useful
- Helps beginners clearly understand the **FIFO (First In, First Out)** concept.  
- Demonstrates trade-offs between different queue implementations.  
- Contains runnable code examples for hands-on learning.  

## Additional Notes
This PR is part of my **Hacktoberfest 2025** contributions.  
Kindly label this PR as **`hacktoberfest-accepted`** if it meets the contribution criteria.  
Thank you for maintaining this awesome open-source repository!

prs.title: Unlimeted colors project using set interval
prs.body:
## Hacktoberfest 2025 Contribution

### Project: Unlimited Colors (setInterval)

A simple and fun **JavaScript project** that continuously changes the background color at fixed time intervals using the **setInterval()** function.  
Built using **HTML, CSS, and JavaScript**, this project demonstrates DOM manipulation, random color generation, and the use of timing functions in JavaScript.

### Features
-  Automatically changes background color every second  
-  Uses `setInterval()` for real-time color updates  
-  Beginner-friendly logic for learning random color generation  
-  Simple and visually appealing interface  
-  Lightweight and responsive  

###  Tech Stack
- HTML  
- CSS  
- JavaScript  

###  Folder Name
`Unlimited-Colors-setInterval`

###  Additional Notes
This mini project is part of my **Hacktoberfest 2025** contributions.  
Please label this PR as **`hacktoberfest-accepted`** if it meets the criteria.  
Thank you for maintaining this awesome open-source project!

prs.title: Added my project called Keyboard Checker
prs.body:
# Keyboard Checker

A simple yet effective web-based tool to test your keyboard keys in real time.  
This project helps users identify malfunctioning keys and check if all keyboard inputs are working correctly.

---

##  Features
- Detects all key presses instantly  
- Clean and minimal interface  
- Highlights pressed keys visually  
- Lightweight and fast — built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript  

---

## How It Works
1. Open the webpage.  
2. Start pressing any key on your keyboard.  
3. The key you press will light up on screen — confirming it’s working properly.  

---

## Screenshots

[Keyboard Checker Screenshot 1](./images/image1.png)
[Keyboard Checker Screenshot 2](./images/image2.png)
---

## Project Purpose
This project was created as part of **Hacktoberfest 2025** 

---

prs.title: Add colorspinner animation
prs.body:
## Animation Details

**Animation Name:** Color Spinner  
**GitHub Handle:** @UserAkku
**Animation Type:** Rotating circles with pulse effect

## Description

I've created a colorful spinner animation with three circles that rotate and pulse continuously. The animation features:
- Three gradient-colored circles rotating in a circular pattern
- Smooth pulsing effect with scale transformations
- Beautiful gradient background
- Fully responsive and looping animation

## Checklist

- [x] Used only HTML and CSS (no JavaScript, no images, no SVG)
- [x] Animation loops continuously without user interaction
- [x] Created proper folder structure: `<username>-colorspinner/`
- [x] Included all required files: `index.html`, `styles.css`, `meta.json`
- [x] Followed naming conventions
- [x] Original work created by me

##  Hacktoberfest 2025

This PR is submitted as part of Hacktoberfest 2025. Thank you for maintaining this awesome repository! 

##  Preview

The animation shows three colorful circles (red, teal, and yellow) rotating around a center point while pulsing in and out, creating a mesmerizing effect against a purple gradient background.

---

Thank you for reviewing! I've made the requested changes. Please let me know if anything else needs to be updated.

prs.title: feat: add 0/1 Knapsack 2D-DP explained with step-by-step comments (Python)
prs.body:
### What this PR does
This PR adds a well-documented implementation of the **0/1 Knapsack problem** using **2D Dynamic Programming** in Python.

###  File Added
`Python/dynamic_programming/knapsack_2d_dp.py`

### Description
- Demonstrates 2D DP table building step-by-step.
- Includes detailed comments and clear explanations for learners.
- Covers complexity analysis, approach explanation, and backtracking logic.
- Contains two example test cases (normal + edge case).

###  Complexity
- Time Complexity: O(N * W)
- Space Complexity: O(N * W)

### Testing
Example outputs included in the file (`if __name__ == "__main__":` section).


Thanks for maintaining this amazing repo! 🙌
